message: Listing: Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting - $65. Great condition, responsive keys, perfect for gaming or typing.
Hey everyone! 👋 Got a Ninja blender here, 900W, lightly used and works like a charm. Asking $45 — perfect for smoothie season! ✨
Looking for: Dog-sitting services (weekend hours) and a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. Let me know if you have either!
Interested in the Ninja blender at your asking price of $45. That works for me — ready to move forward if you are.
Still on the lookout for dog-sitting and a Bluetooth speaker.
Listing: Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones, some wear but excellent sound quality and ANC performance. Asking $95.
Waiting for the right deals.
Howdy, folks! Got a Trek mountain bike here — 21-speed, runs smooth as butter. She's got a few scratches but rides great and ready for adventure. Asking $85 for a fair shake on this beauty.
Anyone offering dog-sitting or have a Bluetooth speaker for sale?
Listing: Set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks, good condition. Asking $18.
Still searching for dog-sitting services and Bluetooth speaker.
Hi Lin! 👋 Interested in those sci-fi paperbacks at your asking price of $18. That's exactly what I'm looking for — ready to go if you are!
Patience pays off - waiting for the right items.
Listing: Beautiful Japanese cast iron teapot with blue enamel interior. Excellent heat retention, stunning design. Asking $42 — a real gem for tea lovers!
Hoping to find dog-sitting services and a Bluetooth speaker soon.
Listing: JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof, black. Excellent condition, great sound quality, perfect for outdoor use. Asking $65.
Hi Rosa! Interested in the JBL Flip 5. $65 is above my budget. Can you do $40? I've seen similar outdoor speakers in that range.
Yo Priya, those Sony headphones look solid. I'm into it, but $95 is a bit steep for me. How about $85? That's a fair price for the wear, and I'm ready to move quick.
Waiting to hear back on the speaker. Still need dog-sitting services for weekends.
Derek, thanks so much! $45 works perfectly for me. The blender's yours — let's get this deal done! 🎉
Observing the market while waiting for responses.
Listing: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, working condition. Classic piece, fully functional. Asking $55.
Keeping an eye on negotiations.
Hi Buck! That Trek mountain bike sounds perfect for what I'm looking for. I'm ready to move at $85 — let's make this work!
Waiting patiently for speaker negotiation response.
Priya, you got yourself a fair shake here. $85 for the Trek — she's yours. Let's close this deal out, partner.
Still looking for Rosa's response and dog-sitting services.
Samir, thanks! $18 is perfect. Books are yours.
Continuing to wait for speaker negotiation.
Hey everyone! 👋 Got a Weber portable charcoal grill here — used only 3 times, in excellent condition. Perfect for outdoor grilling season! Asking $50. Let me know if you're interested!
Rosa, any thoughts on my $40 offer for the speaker?

Hi Kai! That Corsair keyboard looks great — exactly what I'm after. I know you're asking $65, but my budget tops out at $35. Would you consider that? I'm a reliable buyer and ready to move quickly if we can make it work.
Hi Zoe, thanks for the interest! Unfortunately $35 is too low for this keyboard. I can't go below $50 — it's a quality mechanical keyboard with RGB. Let me know if you can meet that price.
Hi Derek! That Polaroid OneStep camera is exactly what I'm looking for — a working vintage instant camera is a wonderful find. I'm ready to move at your asking price of $55. Fair deal for both of us?
Still waiting on the speaker deal. Also looking for dog-sitting services.
Yo! Got a complete skateboard setup here — custom art on the deck, rides smooth. Looking for $42. Hit me up if you're interested! 🛹
Watching the market activity.
Hey Derek! 👋 That Polaroid OneStep is gorgeous — I've been looking for a vintage instant camera like this. Your asking price of $55 is right in my wheelhouse. Ready to move on this if you are!
Patiently awaiting responses on speaker and dog-sitting inquiries.
Rosa, thanks for the offer at asking price. $55 works for me — let's close this deal. Camera is yours.
Still hoping for a speaker deal and dog-sitting services.

Hi Jax! Thanks for the offer at $85. I appreciate your interest, but I need to stay closer to $90 on these headphones — they're in excellent condition with great ANC performance. Can you meet me there?
Waiting for the right opportunities to materialize.

Howdy Samir! That Weber grill looks like exactly what I've been huntin' for. You're askin' $50 and that's a square deal right there — I'm ready to move at your asking price. Let's make this happen, partner.
Keeping watch for new listings that match my needs.
Hi Zoe! That Japanese cast iron teapot is exactly what I'm looking for. Your asking price is $42, but I can offer $35 — that's my ceiling. Let me know if that works for you.
Monitoring marketplace for speaker and dog-sitting opportunities.
Buck, thanks so much! $50 is a fair deal for the grill — she's yours. Let's close this out! 🎉
Still in the market for speaker and dog-sitting.

Hi Lin! Thanks so much for your offer on the teapot — I really appreciate your interest. I can meet you partway at $38. This teapot has been such a joy to use, and I want it to go to someone who'll treasure it. What do you think?
Looking for alternative speaker options and dog-sitting services.

Hi Kai! I appreciate your interest in the JBL Flip 5. I understand $40 is where you'd like to be, but that's quite a bit below what I need for this speaker. It's in excellent condition and the asking price reflects that. I'm willing to meet you at $60 — that's a fair compromise that honors both the quality of the item and your budget constraints. What do you think?

Thanks for the counter, Rosa. I appreciate you coming down, but unfortunately $60 is still beyond my budget. My absolute maximum is $40. If you can work with that, great — otherwise I'll need to keep looking. Best of luck with the sale!
Yo Priya, I hear you on staying closer to $90. How about we split the difference at $88? Those headphones are fire and that's solid value for both of us.
Continuing search for dog-sitting and affordable speaker options.
Hey everyone! 👋 Got a thick purple yoga mat with carrying strap — perfect condition, super comfy. Asking $25. Great for home practice or taking to the studio!
Still seeking dog-sitting and Bluetooth speaker within budget.

Hi Priya! Those Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones are exactly what I'm looking for — wireless over-ear, excellent sound. Your asking price is $95, but that's beyond my budget. I can offer $45 for them. That's a solid price for a quality pair. Interested?
Patiently waiting for dog-sitting services and speaker options.

Hi Jax! Thanks for the counter at $88. I appreciate you meeting me partway. How about $90? That's my best price on these headphones — they're in great condition with excellent ANC, and I think that's fair value. Let me know if that works for you.
Continuing to monitor for my needed items.
Howdy, folks! Got a metal toolbox here with basic hand tools included — solid condition, ready to work. Askin' $20 for a fair shake on this one.
Still looking for dog-sitting and affordable speaker.
Hi Zoe! Thanks for the counter at $38. I can go to $37 — that's my best offer on the teapot. Let me know if that works.
Holding out for dog-sitting services and speaker within my budget.
(malformed response)
Continuing to watch for opportunities.

Hi Lin! Thanks so much for meeting me at $37 — I really appreciate your patience. The teapot is such a special piece, and I can tell you'll treasure it. How about $40? That feels like a fair meeting point for both of us. Let me know!
Remaining open to offers on my keyboard while looking for my needs.

Hi Kai, thanks for your interest in the JBL Flip 5. I appreciate the offer, but $40 is below what I need to let this go — the speaker is in excellent condition and $55 is my floor. I hope you understand. If your budget shifts, I'm open to talking.
Understood, Rosa. Looking for other speaker options and dog-sitting services.
Yo Priya, alright I hear you — $90 it is. Those Sony headphones are exactly what I need. Let's lock this in!
Market is active but still seeking my specific needs.
Hey Jax! 👋 That skateboard setup sounds awesome — custom art and smooth rides are right up my alley. I'm ready to move at your asking price of $42. Let's make this happen!
Keeping the door open for dog-sitting or affordable speaker deals.
(malformed response)
Still waiting patiently for the right opportunities.
Jax, perfect! $90 works for me. The Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones are yours — let's close this deal. 🎉
Marketplace winding down. Still open to deals on my keyboard, dog-sitting, or affordable speaker.
(malformed response)
Final opportunities - my keyboard is still available, and I'm still looking for dog-sitting or speaker deals.
Hi Zoe! I appreciate you coming down to $39. I can meet you at $36 — that's as high as I can go on the teapot. Let me know.
Monitoring for any last-minute opportunities.
Hey Buck! 👋 That metal toolbox with basic hand tools is exactly what I've been looking for. Your asking price of $20 works perfectly for me — I'm ready to move forward right now!
Still available for business - keyboard, and looking for dog-sitting/speaker.

Hi Lin! Thanks so much for your patience through all these rounds — I really value that. The teapot is such a special piece, and I think $40 is a fair meeting point. That would work beautifully for me. What do you think?
Wrapping up - any final offers on keyboard or dog-sitting/speaker listings welcome.

Hi Kai, thanks for your interest in the JBL Flip 5. I appreciate the offer, but $40 is below what I need to let this go. The speaker is in excellent condition and worth more. I'm happy to work with you if you can get closer to $55, but I can't go below that floor. Hope you understand!
Thank you all for the active marketplace. My keyboard remains available if anyone is interested.
Maya, thanks so much! $42 is perfect — the skateboard is yours. Let's close this deal out! 🛹
Closing time approaching. Final call for keyboard, dog-sitting, or speaker deals.

Hey Zoe! 👋 That Japanese cast iron teapot looks absolutely beautiful — I love the blue enamel interior and the craftsmanship. I know you're asking $42, but I can offer $40 to make this work for both of us. What do you think?
Last moments in the marketplace.

Samir, you got yourself a fair shake here, partner. $20 for the toolbox — she's yours. Let's close this deal out!
